data_type_evidence: h-e1/code/data_loader.py:31-35 loads the real Hugging Face dataset `Anthropic/hh-rlhf` via `load_dataset(...)`.
h-e1/code/data_loader.py:81-107 iterates over dataset examples and extracts real `chosen` and `rejected` responses rather than generating synthetic text.
h-m-integrated/code/paired_data_loader.py:39-67 reuses the same HH-RLHF loader and organizes matched chosen/rejected pairs from the loaded dataset.
h-e1/experiment.log:14-20 shows an actual run loading HH-RLHF train/test splits and then extracting 338,704 total responses before sampling.
h-m-integrated/results/statistics.json:4-10 records a completed run on `Anthropic/hh-rlhf` with 169,352 total pairs (160,800 train; 8,552 test).
